name: changelog-generator
tagline: Generates user-facing changelogs from git commit history.
verdict: Clear, safe prose skill for turning commits into changelogs, but light on rigor: no explicit git commands, no failure handling, no rerun/dedup guard, and no versioning signal. Low risk, moderate execution reliability.

highlights.summary: Description says what it does ('Automatically creates user-facing changelogs...') but never states when to invoke it.
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope guidance anywhere in the skill.
No actual git commands shown (e.g. git log) for scanning history; steps stay conceptual.
